source.section: 4 - AN/ASQ-228 ATFLIR Targeting Pod > 4.7 - Air-to-Air Operation > 4.7.2 - Auto Track

steps.action: Make sure the targeting pod is powered
Press the A/A Master Mode button. The RDR ATTK (radar) page will appear on the right DDI and the FLIR page will appear on the left DDI.
Select FLIR by pressing the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the FLIR page (left).
The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
Select BST (Boresight) mode by selecting the BST pushbutton on the FLIR page. The FLIR will be slaved to the boresight line of sight.
Press OSB next to RTCL (boxed) to display the targeting pod’s reticle Sensor Control Switch AFT/FWD/LEFT/RIGHT Reticle 4 - AN/ASQ-228
Use the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) AFT/FWD/LEFT/AFT Controls to slew the targeting pod on the target. Slewing the targeting pod will automatically disengage Boresight mode.
You can zoom and choose desired FLIR/TV setting using the appropriate Option Select Buttons on the FLIR page.
Press/bump the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the FLIR format page (left) to attempt to Auto Track the target.
When Auto Track is obtained, a designation box will appear on the HUD and the targeting pod will track the target.
If you want to “dump” the target, press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the FLIR page (left).
